allow: Bash(IF="/Applications/Xcode-beta.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX27.0.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks/FoundationModels.framework/Versions/A/Modules/FoundationModels.swiftmodule/arm64e-apple-ios-macabi.swiftinterface"; echo "===== DynamicGenerationSchema ====="; grep -nE "struct DynamicGenerationSchema|public init|struct Property" "$IF" | grep -A0 -iE "DynamicGenerationSchema|Property|init\\\(name|init\\\(arrayOf|init\\\(referenceTo|init\\\(type" | head -40)

Bash(IF="/Applications/Xcode-beta.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX27.0.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks/FoundationModels.framework/Versions/A/Modules/FoundationModels.swiftmodule/arm64e-apple-ios-macabi.swiftinterface"; echo "===== Tool protocol ====="; grep -n "public protocol Tool" "$IF"; sed -n '/public protocol Tool /,/^}/p' "$IF" | head -40)
Bash(xcodebuild -project TriGenius_app.xcodeproj -scheme TriGenius_app -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16 Pro' build)
